name: Oriental Pork Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boneless pork, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 red or green bell pepper, cut in strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a Dutch oven or large saucepan over medium-high heat until hot.
2. Add pork, onion, and garlic; cook until pork is brown.
3. Stir in 2 cups water, beef-flavor instant bouillon, and soy sauce. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Add celery, bell pepper, green beans, sliced water chestnuts, and mushrooms. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat; cover and simmer an additional 5-10 minutes or until vegetables are done.
7. Combine 1/4 cup water and cornstarch in a small bowl. Gradually add to the vegetable mixture, stirring constantly.
8. Cook and stir until thickened. Serve over rice.
